channel.title: AI Automation on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in AI Automation on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Automate Repetitive Tasks with OpenClaw AI for Solopreneurs
item.description: If you’re a solopreneur or freelancer, you know the grind of repetitive tasks. Updating spreadsheets, drafting emails, sorting data, posting on social media—these things eat up hours you could spend on high-value work like closing deals or creating content. You’ve probably wondered if there’s a way to offload this grunt work without hiring help. That’s where AI steps in, and specifically, a tool like OpenClaw can change the game. But before we get to any product, let’s break down how you can start automating tasks today, even if you’re new to AI.

item.title: How to Automate Repetitive Tasks as a Solopreneur with AI
item.description: How to Automate Repetitive Tasks as a Solopreneur with AI If you’re a solopreneur, freelancer, or small business owner, you’re probably drowning in repetitive tasks. Think about the hours spent on invoicing, scheduling social media posts, answering the same customer emails, or organizing data. These things eat your time, drain your energy, and keep you from focusing on what actually grows your business—whether that’s creating content, closing deals, or building relationships.

item.title: How to Automate Your Solopreneur Business with AI Workflows
item.description: How to Automate Your Solopreneur Business with AI Workflows You’re a solopreneur, freelancer, or small business owner, and your to-do list is a mile long. You’re drowning in repetitive tasks—email follow-ups, content scheduling, customer inquiries—that eat up hours you could spend on growth or, frankly, just breathing. You’ve heard AI can help, but where do you even start? It feels like another thing to learn when you’re already stretched thin.
